[![Español](https://img.shields.io/badge/Espa%C3%B1ol-ES-yellow?logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,&logoColor=white)](README.es.md)

# Jaider R.

Backend-focused Software Engineering student building robust APIs and data pipelines with TypeScript and Lua. I work with messy, unstructured data and turn it into reliable flows: parsers, APIs, pipelines and backend services. I contribute to [Shosetsu Extensions](https://gitlab.com/shosetsuorg/extensions) and built the backend for [Amaru](https://github.com/Amaruorg/amaru-gmail-agent), an AI email assistant built on DDD and LLM integration.

Open to backend internship and junior backend roles.

[![Website](https://img.shields.io/badge/Website-01C585?logo=rss&logoColor=white)](#)
[![GitLab](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitLab-FC6D26?logo=gitlab&logoColor=fff)](https://gitlab.com/bigrand)

## Projects

### [Shosetsu | Plugins & Web Scrapers](https://gitlab.com/shosetsuorg/extensions)

Open source Lua plugin ecosystem, shipped to real users.

- Built [**novelvault**](https://gitlab.com/shosetsuorg/extensions/-/blob/dev/lib/novelvault.lua), a metadata-driven Lua web scraping framework that cut plugin onboarding from hours to ~10 minutes
- Wrote [**unhtml**](https://gitlab.com/shosetsuorg/extensions/-/blob/dev/lib/unhtml.lua), an HTML-to-string parser in Lua that preserves semantic structure and paragraph flow

### [Amaru | AI Email Assistant](https://github.com/Amaruorg/amaru-gmail-agent)

Sole backend developer.

- Designed the backend architecture using DDD: Gmail OAuth, email ingestion, LLM integration, action execution
- Pushed LLM processing reliability from 40% to 85% per batch through model benchmarking and strict JSON schema validation
